name: Adventure
description: Trekking, climbing, and adrenaline-fueled journeys across the planet's most dramatic landscapes.

description: Immersive tours through ancient cities, museums, and living traditions passed down through generations.

name: Food & Wine
description: Michelin-starred dining, street food safaris, vineyard hops, and cooking classes with local masters.

name: Beach & Island
description: Pristine shorelines, coral reefs, overwater villas, and sun-soaked island escapes.

name: Mountains
description: Alpine retreats, ski adventures, mountain lodge stays, and summit sunrise experiences.

description: World-class spa resorts, yoga retreats, hot springs, and holistic healing journeys.

name: Photography

description: Guided safaris and wildlife encounters from African plains to Arctic tundras.

description: Walk through centuries of history with expert-guided tours of the world's most significant sites.
